user.title: Integration Setup
user.description: Please enter your PRIM API key to access IDFM data.

search_stop_area.title: Search for a Stop
search_stop_area.description: Enter a stop name to search in the local database.

select_stop_area.title: Select a Stop
select_stop_area.description: Choose a stop from the list. You may also customize the line name (optional).

create_first_entry.title: Creating Configuration
create_first_entry.description: Initializing configuration with your first line.

main_menu.title: Main Menu
main_menu.description: What would you like to do?

add_ligne_details.title: Add a Line
add_ligne_details.description: Configure a new line to monitor.

add_message.title: Add a Custom Message
add_message.description: Add a message that will be displayed in associated entities.

delete.title: Delete a Line
delete.description: Select the line you want to delete.

error.invalid_api_key: The provided API key is invalid.
error.no_results: No stops found for this search.

abort.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the PRIM service.
